Interface IUtilityNetworkQueryAssociation

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that supply utility network query association information.

[Guid("51B3F4F7-B1B8-4A84-B70F-562DA58C64A1")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IUtilityNetworkQueryAssociation

Methods

AttachedFeatures(esriElementType, long, out object, out object)

Returns the attached object EIDs for the given structure EID.

ElementType esriElementType
structureEID long
attachedFeatureEIDs object
attachedFeatureElementTypes object
